descricao: Every 2 hours, fetches completed Stripe payments, matches them against the TOConline service catalog by amount and VAT rate, automatically issues receipt-invoices, and logs them in Google Sheets.
problema: Issuing invoices after each Stripe payment was done manually in the billing system, causing delays and tax compliance risk.
resultado: Invoices issued automatically within 2 hours of payment, with a full log.
metrica: Automatic billing every 2 hours with amount/VAT matching
destaques: Automatic product matching by amount and VAT tier
